Name: GENERATOR_LOCATION_PARAM
Description: Defines a spawn or generator placement in world space, including position and orientation data.

Fields.Name: Placement Position: X
Fields.Description: World-space X coordinate where the generator is placed.

Fields.Name: Placement Position: Y
Fields.Description: World-space Y coordinate where the generator is placed.

Fields.Name: Placement Position: Z
Fields.Description: World-space Z coordinate where the generator is placed.

Fields.Name: Placement Rotation: X
Fields.Description: Rotation around the X-axis (pitch) for generator orientation.

Fields.Name: Placement Rotation: Y
Fields.Description: Rotation around the Y-axis (yaw) for generator orientation.

Fields.Name: Placement Rotation: Z
Fields.Description: Rotation around the Z-axis (roll) for generator orientation.

Fields.Name: Inherit Instance Param ID
Fields.Description: Inherit the instance param properties from the target ID.
